name: us-washingtons-war
description: Washington's War: Keep the Army Alive — Unit 2 U.S. History strategy game (TEKS 8.4B, 8.4C, 8.22A, 8.31B). Command the Continental Army from Boston to Yorktown across 7 campaigns and 14 decisions, where the winning move is almost never the glorious one — retreat, drill, endure, and be standing when France's fleet shuts the trap. Server-authoritative Socket.IO backend with a live Teacher Command Center.
comment: No npm workspaces: this drive is exFAT, which cannot host the symlinks/junctions workspace linking requires. server/ and client/ install independently; `npm install` here cascades via postinstall.

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server --no-fund --no-audit && npm install --prefix client --no-fund --no-audit
